name: Women's Plastic Angular Round Wavy Metal Temples Sunglasses - A New Day™ Black Denim: UV Protection, Impact-Resistant
description:
Look your stylish best on sunny-day outings with these Plastic Angular Round Wavy Metal Temples Sunglasses from A New Day™. These plastic sunglasses will elevate your look with the black frame, wavy metal temples and multicolored lenses, and the stylish round silhouette looks great with casual and dressier ensembles alike. Plus, UV protection helps keep your eyes shielded from the sun.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
